hooks.command: last_commit_date=$(git log -1 --format=%ci 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f1); today=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); if [ "$last_commit_date" != "$today" ]; then echo "Updated: $(date)" >> README.md && git add README.md && git commit -m "daily activity" && git push origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) 2>/dev/null; fi
